Campaign SOP
The eCommerce agency SOP is a step by step procedural process to systemise
ecom campaign builds to ensure nothing gets dropped - it's like a paint by
number for FB ads!
In this module you will see a whole list of how to's and videos, these all make up and
are linked to from the main SOP (standard operating procedure) which is a Trello
Board.
While accessing and going through the SOP - disregard the videos in this section - just
use the main link (posted below).
ACCESS SOP HERE: https://trello.com/b/49ok8vII
Mark As Complete
